allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.get\('devDependencies',{}\).items\(\) if 'jest' in k or 'testing' in k}, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\), **d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(k,v\) for k,v in deps.items\(\) if 'eslint' in k.lower\(\) or 'typescript' in k.lower\(\)]")
Bash(node -e "const cfg = require\('eslint-config-next/typescript'\); const rules = cfg?.rules || {}; const key = '@typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any'; console.log\(key, rules[key] || 'not set'\);")
Bash(node -e "const {Linter} = require\('eslint'\); const l = new Linter\(\); console.log\('ok'\)")

Bash(node -e "const cfg = require\('@typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin'\); const rec = cfg.configs.recommended; const rules = rec?.rules || {}; console.log\('@typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any:', rules['@typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any']\)")
